name: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
12 ounces white chocolate, cut into 1/4-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover two cookie sheets with wax paper or foil and set aside.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a bowl and set aside.
3. Beat butter until creamy at low speed using a mixer.
4. Gradually add sugars and beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Use a 1/4 cup measuring cup to form cookies; pack dough so it is even.
8. Drop cookies onto the prepared baking sheets, leaving 3 inches between them.
9. Flatten the dough slightly.
10. Bake on the center rack of a preheated oven at 300 degrees for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and soft in the center.
11. Allow to cool on wire racks for 3-5 minutes after baking.
